description: Ethnic thong style sandals with wedge heels from catwalk. Fashioned for the ethnic diva, these sandals can be worn with traditional ensemblesUpperThong style straps made of suede with heavy stone, wooden and plastic bead embellishmentsSuede lining for durability and comfortSynthetic leather toe separator for a snug FitPadded footbed with branding for comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with wedge heelsHerringbone pattern on the forefoot and terraced grooves on the heel for added comfortSlipper CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
